<!--
  Thanks for the contribution! Keep PRs focused and make sure the full gate
  passes locally before requesting review. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123". Delete if not applicable. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` (and `pnpm test:e2e` if relevant) passes
- [ ] Updated the relevant `docs/context/*` doc (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Updated `docs/PROJECT_STATUS.md` (if this completes a tracked step)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything worth calling out: tradeoffs, follow-ups, things you're unsure about. -->
